glosses.ja: カラーの; 色付きの

translations.vi: Tấm poster này nhiều màu sắc lắm.
translations.hi: पोस्टर सच में बहुत रंगीन है.
translations.ja: ポスターはとても色鮮やかです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular neuter; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun; neuter; singular; syntactic subject of the copula.
Copular auxiliary; present tense; 3rd person singular; links subject with predicate.
Degree adverb/intensifier modifying the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective (prädikativ) serving as the complement to the copula.

sentences.target: Ich finde die Jacke zu farbig.

translations.de: Ich finde die Jacke zu farbig.
translations.en: I think the jacket is too colorful.
translations.es: Creo que la chaqueta es demasiado colorida.
translations.fr: Je trouve la veste trop colorée.
translations.it: Secondo me la giacca è troppo colorata.
translations.ko: 저는 그 재킷이 너무 화려하다고 생각해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我觉得这件夹克太花了。
translations.ru: Я считаю, что эта куртка слишком пёстрая.
translations.pt: Acho que a jaqueta é colorida demais.
translations.vi: Mình thấy chiếc áo khoác này quá sặc sỡ.
translations.ar: أظن أن السترة ملونة أكثر من اللازم.
translations.nl: Ik vind de jas te kleurrijk.
translations.uk: Я вважаю, що ця куртка занадто строката.
translations.hu: Szerintem ez a kabát túl színes.
translations.hi: मुझे लगता है कि यह जैकेट बहुत ज्यादा रंगीन है.
translations.pl: Uważam, że ta kurtka jest zbyt kolorowa.
translations.el: Νομίζω ότι το μπουφάν είναι υπερβολικά πολύχρωμο.
translations.nb: Jeg synes jakken er for fargerik.
translations.sv: Jag tycker att jackan är för färgglad.
translations.ro: Mi se pare că jacheta e prea colorată.
translations.cs: Myslím, že ta bunda je příliš barevná.
translations.da: Jeg synes, jakken er for farverig.
translations.ja: そのジャケットはちょっと派手すぎると思う。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present tense; 1st person singular; takes a direct object and an object predicative.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine; determiner of the direct object noun.
Common noun; feminine; singular; direct object of 'finde'.
Degree adverb meaning 'too', modifying the adjective in the object predicative.
Object predicative adjective describing 'Jacke' (secondary predicate) within the complement of 'finde'.

sentences.target: Die Blumen sind heute besonders farbig.

translations.de: Die Blumen sind heute besonders farbig.
translations.en: The flowers are especially colorful today.
translations.es: Hoy las flores están especialmente coloridas.
translations.fr: Les fleurs sont particulièrement colorées aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi i fiori sono particolarmente colorati.
translations.pt: Hoje as flores estão especialmente coloridas.
translations.vi: Hôm nay hoa trông đặc biệt rực rỡ.
translations.nl: De bloemen zijn vandaag bijzonder kleurrijk.
translations.hi: आज फूल खास तौर पर रंग-बिरंगे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα τα λουλούδια είναι ιδιαίτερα πολύχρωμα.
translations.nb: Blomstene er spesielt fargerike i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini bunganya terlihat sangat berwarna-warni.
translations.sv: Blommorna är särskilt färgglada i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi florile sunt deosebit de colorate.
translations.da: Blomsterne er særligt farverige i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は花がひときわ鮮やかだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun; plural; syntactic subject of the copula.
Copular auxiliary; present tense; 3rd person plural; links subject with predicate.
Temporal adverb specifying the time frame of the state.
Degree/focus adverb intensifying the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective (prädikativ) as complement to the copula.

sentences.target: Du kannst das Dokument farbig drucken.

translations.de: Du kannst das Dokument farbig drucken.
translations.en: You can print the document in color.
translations.es: Puedes imprimir el documento en color.
translations.fr: Tu peux imprimer le document en couleur.
translations.it: Puoi stampare il documento a colori.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把文档打印成彩色。
translations.yue: 你可以用彩色打印份文件。
translations.ru: Ты можешь распечатать документ в цвете.
translations.pt: Você pode imprimir o documento em cores.
translations.he: אתה יכול להדפיס את המסמך בצבע.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể in tài liệu màu.
translations.nl: Je kunt het document in kleur printen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш надрукувати документ у кольорі.
translations.hi: तुम दस्तावेज़ को रंगीन छाप सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να εκτυπώσεις το έγγραφο έγχρωμα.
translations.nb: Du kan skrive ut dokumentet i farger.
translations.sv: Du kan skriva ut dokumentet i färg.
translations.da: Du kan printe dokumentet i farver.
translations.ja: ドキュメントをカラーで印刷できます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular; nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; present tense; 2nd person singular; selects bare infinitive 'drucken' as main verb.
Definite article; accusative singular neuter; determiner of the direct object noun.
Common noun; neuter; singular; direct object of 'drucken'.
Adjective used adverbially, modifying the manner of the action ('drucken').
Main verb in bare infinitive, selected by the modal 'kannst'.
